meta.description: Track household chores and monthly contributions.

login.title: Chore tracker
login.step2Sub: Choose the name you use for chores in this household.
login.selectMemberRequired: Choose your name from the list.
login.registerCreateDisabled: Creating households is disabled on this server. Ask an admin for a household id, then choose “Join an existing household”.
login.householdIdRequired: Enter the household id you want to join.
login.newHouseholdIdRequired: Enter an id for the new household.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load chores from the server. Run `npm start` and open this page from the app URL (not file://).
errors.choosePreset: Choose a chore from your presets.
errors.selectLocation: Select at least one location for "{{title}}".
errors.saveChore: Could not save chore. Is the server running?
errors.deleteEntry: Could not delete entry. Is the server running?
errors.scheduledStartUpdate: Could not update scheduled chore start date.
errors.scheduledReminderUpdate: Could not update reminder setting for this scheduled chore.

stats.balanceHintTasks: By task count: 100% = everyone did the same share; 0% = one person logged every task.
stats.balanceHintPoints: By points: 100% = everyone earned the same share; 0% = one person earned every point.

heatmap.title: Daily activity
heatmap.subtitle: Tasks logged per day in the selected month (darker = more tasks).

scheduled.sectionSub: Recurring tasks and when they are due next. Mark done here to reset the timer.
scheduled.dialogHint: Next due is computed from the last time you marked done, or from the start date if never done. You can edit start date per chore below.
scheduled.settingsHint: Recurring tasks (weekly, every 2 weeks, etc.). Due dates reset only when you mark them done.
scheduled.suggestionsIntro: Scheduled chores due soon or overdue — tap to fill if the title matches a preset.
scheduled.doneHint: Adds one entry to today’s chore log with the scheduled task name, then resets the timer.

logForm.title: Log a chore
logForm.hintSemicolon: Use a semicolon (;) between preset names to log several at once.
logForm.locationsHint: Applied only to chores using per-location points.
logForm.quickHint: Uses the date and person above — one tap to log.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutIntro: Server and storage details for this installation. GitHub Actions build metadata appears here when the host sets the usual GITHUB_* variables (or CHORELOG_GITHUB_* overrides) at deploy time.
settings.languageHint: Interface language. Data (chore names, people) is not translated.
settings.presetsHint: Title, points, and color for each selectable chore.
settings.quickLogHint: Buttons under “Log a chore” — order matches the list below.
settings.discordHint: When a scheduled chore is overdue, the server can POST to a Discord incoming webhook (channel settings → Integrations → Webhooks).
settings.remindIntervalAria: Minimum time between Discord reminders per chore
settings.discordTestOk: Test message sent. Check your Discord channel.
settings.discordTestErr: Test failed. Check the webhook URL and try again.
settings.discordPostErr: Could not post. Configure a valid webhook URL and try again.
settings.quietHoursHint: Uses the server’s local clock. Crosses midnight (e.g. 22:00–08:00).
settings.extraChannelsHint: Optional. Overdue alerts are sent to every URL you configure. Slack uses plain text; generic URLs receive the same JSON payload as Discord.
settings.pushHint: Overdue reminders on this device when the app is closed (PWA). Turn on “Send overdue reminders automatically” above (no webhook URL required for push-only). Same reminder interval and quiet hours. Each device subscribes separately.
settings.pushServerOff: Push is not configured on this server (administrator must set VAPID keys).
settings.pushRequiresHttps: Use HTTPS (or localhost) for push notifications.
settings.pushHouseholdOnly: Browser push (PWA) can only be set up while signed in to the default household (the admin household created on first install).
settings.pushHouseholdNotAllowed: Browser push is only available for the default household. Sign in to that household to enable it.
settings.pushIosHint: On iPhone and iPad, add Chorelog to the Home Screen (Share → Add to Home Screen) and open it from the icon — Web Push does not run in a normal Safari tab. Requires iOS/iPadOS 16.4 or newer. If push still fails, set the server’s VAPID subject to a real address (mailto:user@yourdomain.com); Apple may reject localhost-style values.
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support Web Push.
settings.pushEnabledOk: This device will receive overdue push reminders.
settings.pushEnableErr: Could not enable push. Try again or check server configuration.
settings.pushVerifyErr: Subscription was not saved on the server. Try again, or check that you are signed in to the same household.
settings.pushDisabledOk: Push was turned off for this device.
settings.pushTestOk: Test push sent — check your notifications.
settings.pushTestErr: Test push failed (see message above if shown).
settings.accountDisplayNameHint: Shown as the actor in the audit log.
settings.accountChangePasswordHint: Updates the password for this household only.
settings.accountPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.accountCreateHintMaster: Add another isolated store. Requires the server master password (set CHORELOG_MASTER_PASSWORD on the server).
settings.accountCreateHintOpen: Add another isolated store. Open registration is enabled on this server.
settings.accountCreateHintBoth: Add another isolated store. Use the master password if the server requires it, or leave it blank when open registration is enabled.
settings.accountCreateOk: Household created. You can sign in to it from the login screen.
settings.auditHint: Changes to the activity log and household settings (newest first). The signed-in account name is stored as the actor.
settings.dataHint: Import can replace everything or merge with a prompt. JSON export includes people, log entries, and scheduled chores. CSV is log entries only (spreadsheet-friendly).

editEntry.title: Edit entry
editEntry.locationsHint: Applied only to chores using per-location points.

deleteEntry.title: Delete this entry?
deleteEntry.hint: This removes it from your log.

import.confirm:
Merge with existing data on the server?

OK = Merge (append imported entries; combine people lists).
Cancel = Replace all server data with this file.
